##NAMES=Pyroxferroite
##RRUFFID=R140465
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Fe^2+^SiO_3_
##LOCALITY=Isanago mine, Ohro, Kyotango city, Kyoto Prefecture, Kinki Region, Honshu Island, Japan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Vitreous pinkish granular crystals, associated with black magnetite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140465
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
